contexts.context: ...agers delinquent. Nor were you ever one yto <mark>behave</mark> your temper: let Youth pick a fruit or...
...ways,remember: when happy,men on the whole <mark>behave</mark> a wee bit better, when unhappy,always worse....
...you in good spirits and that Summer is better <mark>behaved</mark> in Austria than it is here in Ireland....
